projects.name: Kazakhstan mining development and ore logistics watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Track mine expansion, crushing, hauling, loading, unloading and railway/port links.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires official owner, license, reserve, transport route and capex evidence.

projects.name: Kazakhstan metallurgy and smelter modernization watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Monitor furnace, raw-material handling, environmental retrofit and steel plant equipment demand.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires official investment plan, plant owner confirmation and technical scope.

projects.name: Kazakhstan thermal power and coal handling watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Watch generation capacity, coal mine feedstock, wagon tippler, stacker and conveyor packages.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires government energy plan, fuel supply route, EPC model and emissions constraints.

projects.name: Caspian Sea port construction and bulk cargo handling watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Track Aktau/Kuryk quay, storage yard, lifting, transport and ore loading projects.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires port authority source, financing plan, cargo forecast and sanction/compliance check.

projects.name: Kazakhstan oil refining and petrochemical modernization watch
projects.opportunity_signal: Monitor refinery upgrade, utilities, storage, loading and environmental equipment packages.
projects.feasibility_gate: Requires owner announcement, tender evidence, sanctions screen and payment route review.
